_comment: Two channels with distinct delivery sources. 'stable' pulls the latest 7.2.x ROCm release from AMD's official apt mirror at https://repo.radeon.com/rocm/apt/ — 7.2.x is not published as a TheRock tarball, apt is the only channel AMD ships it on. 'preview' pulls the latest 7.12.x TheRock distribution tarball from https://repo.amd.com/rocm/tarball/ — 7.12.x is not yet on the apt mirror, tarball is the only channel AMD ships it on. Each channel auto-discovers the newest patch release of its version_prefix by parsing the respective AMD directory index; no 'latest' pseudo-version is accepted. Any other channel, source, or version_prefix must be rejected by the install step.

stable.description: Latest 7.2.x ROCm release from AMD's apt mirror at repo.radeon.com. Auto-discovers the newest patch (e.g. 7.2.2 as of 2026-04-24).

preview.description: Latest 7.12.x TheRock distribution tarball from repo.amd.com. Auto-discovers the newest patch (e.g. 7.12.0 as of 2026-04-24).
